Song Lyrics :

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup 
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Kya Kaheen Kar Aayi Tu Munh Kaala Re 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Raat Kiya Re Tune Kaisa Ghotala

Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi

Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Vo Bahanoi Tha Bahanoi Thahara 
Kyon Na Pahachaana Toone Piya Ji Ka Chehara 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bahanoi Ne Odh Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Rakhi Thi Chaadar Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Main Samajhi Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Piya Ka Hai Bistar Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Aadhe Bistar Pe Vo Soya Tha
Aadhe Pe Main So Gai 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata To Hoga
Chhitaki To Hogi Chhat Pe Chandaniya 
Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bhool Hui Mujhase To Kaisa Achambha
Kaisa Achambha Kaisa Achambha
Bahanoi Tha Piya Jitana Lamba
Piya Jitana Lamba Piya Jitana Lamba
Choor Thi Main Din Bhar Ki Thakan Se 
Padate Hi Bistar Pe So Gai 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Soch Rahe The Ham Sab Jaisa
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Raat Kiya Nahi Munh Toone Kaala

snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios‚Äô first-ever foray into the genre, ‚ÄúClayface‚ÄĚ is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

‚ÄúClayface‚ÄĚ unravels one man‚Äôs horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one‚Äôs identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins‚Äô creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, ‚ÄúClayface.‚ÄĚ The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.description:
|| ūüēČ || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

en.title: Bangles (Official¬†#Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | ŗ§¨ŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§óŗ§°ŗ•Ä
en.description:
|| ūüēČ || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

snippet.title: Jawaak (Official Trailer) | Neeru Bajwa | New Punjabi Movie 2026 | In Cinemas 8th May 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents the official trailer of Jawaak, an upcoming Punjabi kids' movie starring the versatile Neeru Bajwa. This heartwarming children‚Äôs movie revolves around the journey of four young friends, capturing the innocence, imagination, and strong bond of childhood.

Jawaak beautifully blends fun, emotions, and meaningful life lessons, making it a perfect family movie. The film highlights themes of friendship presented through engaging storytelling and relatable characters. With vibrant visuals and a feel-good narrative, this kids' movie promises to connect with both children and adults alike.

If you enjoy children's movies that focus on friendship stories, coming-of-age adventures, and family-friendly entertainment, Jawaak is definitely one to watch. Stay tuned for an upcoming Punjabi movie that celebrates childhood in its purest form.

snippet.title: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
snippet.description:
Nowhere to hide. ūüĒ• #EvilDeadBurn only in theaters July 10. Full trailer coming soon.


Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise‚Äôs most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites‚ÄĒturning the gathering into a family reunion from hell‚ÄĒshe comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Cast:  Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink

snippet.title: Tujhko Hi Dulhan Banaoonga - Full Video | Chalo Ishq Ladaaye | Sonu Nigam, Alka Yagnik | 90's Hits
snippet.description:
Song Credits
Singer(s): Sonu Nigam, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Vijay Mehta
Director: Aziz Sajawal
Cast: Govinda, Rani Mukherjee, Kader Khan, Johnny Lever, Zohra Sehgal

Lyrics:
Mehendi Hai Mehendi
Sharma Na Aise Banno Re
Ab Jana Hai Ghar Tuhjko Sajan Ke
Chalenge Hum BHi Tere Sang
Tere Dahej Mein Tere Ghar Sajan Ke
Tujhko Hi
Tujhko Hi
Oy Tujhko Hi Dulhan Banaoonga
Warna Kunwara Mar Jaaoonga
Tujhko Hi Dulhan Banaoonga
Warna Kunwara Mar Jaaoonga
Jake Jogan Ban Jaungi
Sang Tere Na Mein Aaungi
Sab Se Me Yeh Keh Jaungi
Tujhko Na Dulhan Banaungi X2
Chahe Kunwari Mar Jaungi X2
Tere Liye Launga Bindiya Chand Sitaron Ki
Ha Tere Liye Launga Bindiya Chand Sitaron Ki
Pehnaunga Chunar Main Tujhko Nayi Baharon Ki
Arey Jaa Re Kunware
Mujhpe Dore Dal Na Tu Aise
Mere Aage Pichhe Firte Hai Tere Jaise
Nakhre Na Kar Deewani
Abb Man Bhi Jaa Rani
Naa Banegi Teree Kahani
Chal Chhod Dey Yeh Manmani
Tujhko Hi Challa Pehnaunga
Ha Tujhko Hi Challa Pehnaunga
Warna Kunwara Mar Jaaoonga
Jake Jogan Ban Jaungi
Sang Tere Na Main Aaungi
Sab Se Me Yeh Keh Jaungi
Tujhko Naa Dula Banaungi
Chahe Kunwari Mar Jaungi

Shadi Wadi Ke Chakkar Mein
Mujhe Nhi Padna
Arey Shadi Wadi Ke Chakkar Mein
Mujhe Nhi Padna
Char Deewaro Mein Gut Gut Ke
Mujhe Nahii Marna
Khuli Hawaon Ki Mein
Tujhko Ser Karaunga
Honey Moon Mein London Paris Tujhe Gumanunga
Chikni Chikni Bato Mein Aaon Naa Tere Hatho Mein
Mujhko Jo Takraye Gi Too Bad Mein Pachtayegi
Na Sej Teri Sajaungi
Ha Na Sej Teri Sajaungi
Chahe Kunwari Mar Jaungi
Bin Tere Na Jee Paonga
Bine Tere Na Mar Paonga
Sab Se Mein Yeh Keh Jaaoonga
Tujhko Hi Dulhan Banaoonga
Warna Kunwara Mar Jaaoonga
Yeh Jid Chhod Dey Nata Jod De
Rab Kaa Naam Le
Daman Tham Le
Maan Bhi Le Tu Mera Kehna Saath Tere Nahi Mujhko Rehna
Kab Doli Baarat Mein Lau Kaise Tujhko Mein Samjau
Kya Tune Yeh Soch Liya Hai
Haan Maine Yeh Soch Liya Hai
Yaro Zeher Ki Pudiya Lao
Yeh Pagal Hai Isse Bachao
Tere Bina Mujhko Nahi Jina
Karna Aisi Khata Kabhi Na
Mujhko Ab Yeh Zeher Hai Pina
Zakh Mein Dil Muhjko Nahi Sina
Chhod Ke Duniya Chala Main Chala X3
Lagata Iski Jan Gayi Re X3
Ise Kaho Main Maan Gayi Re X3
Ooooo Lo Mein Maan Gayi
Ha Mein Maan Gayi
Tere Pyar Ko Main Pehchan Gayi
Tujhko Hi Dulha Banaungi
Tujhse Hi Shadi Rachaungi
Warna Kunwari Mar Jaungi

Warna Kunwari Mar Jaungi

Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages ‚Äď including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal ‚Äď The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. snippet.title: Meri Mehbooba - Lyrical | Zara Tasveer Se Tu Nikal Ke Samne Aa | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik | Pardes
snippet.description:
Song: Meri Mehbooba
Movie:  Pardes
Singer: Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi

Song Lyrics:
Kisi Roz Tumse Mulaakat Hogi
Meri Jaan Us Din Mere Saath Hogi
Magar Kab Na Jaane Yeh Barsaat Hogi

snippet.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng ūüíĖ‚ú®

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. ūüíę

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don‚Äôt miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. ūüé∂

localized.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng ūüíĖ‚ú®

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. ūüíę

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don‚Äôt miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. ūüé∂

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. snippet.title: Ghoonghat Ki Aad Se Dilbar Ka | Hum Hain Rahi Pyar Ke (1993) | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Singer(s): Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tahir Hussain
Director: Mahesh Bhatt
Cast: Aamir Khan, Juhi Chawla

Song Lyrics:

Ghoonghat Ki Aad Se Dilbar Ka
Didaar Adhooraa Rahata Hai
Ghoonghat Ki Aad Se Dilbar Ka
Didaar Adhooraa Rahata Hai
Jab Tak Naa Pade Aashiq Ki Nazar 
Jab Tak Naa Pade Aashiq Ki Nazar
Singaar Adhuraa Rahata Hai
Ghoonghat Ki Aad Se Dilbar Ka

Ghoonghat Ki Aad Se Dilbar Ka
Didaar Adhooraa Rahata Hai
Jab Tak Naa Mile Nazaron Se Nazar
Jab Tak Naa Mile Nazaron Se Nazar
Iqaraar Adhooraa Rahata Hai
Ghoonghat Ki Aad Se Dilbar Ka
Dilbar Ka Dilbar Ka Dilbar Ka
Dilbar Ka Dilbar Ka Dilbar Ka

Gore Mukhade Se Ghoonghata Hatane De
Ghadi Apane Milan Ki To Aane De
Mere Dil Pe Nahin Mera Kaboo Hai
Kuchh Nahin Ye Chaahat Ka Jaadoo Hai
Badhati Hi Jaati Hain Sanam Pyaar Ki Ye Bekhudi Ho
Do Premiyon Ke Naa Milane Se
Sansaar Adhooraa Rahataa Hai
Jab Tak Naa Pade Aashiq Ki Nazar
Jab Tak Naa Pade Aashiq Ki Nazar
Singaar Adhuraa Rahataa Hai

Dilbar Ka Dilbar Ka Dilbar Ka
Haan! Dilbar Ka Dilbar Ka Dilbar Ka

Baag Mein Gul Ka Khilanaa Zaroori Hai
Haan Mohabbat Mein Milana Zaroori Hai
Paas Aane Ka Achchhaa Bahaanaa Hai
Kyaa Karoon Main Ki Mausam Divaanaa Hai
Dil Meraa DhadaKane Lagi Ab To Ye Diwaanagi Ho
Binaa Kisi Yaar Ke Jaan-E-Jaan
Ye Pyaar Adhooraa Rahataa Hai
Jab Tak Na Mile Nazaron Se Nazar

Iqaraar Adhooraa Rahataa Hai

SXYBIT ‚Äď One For The Night (Official Music Video)
One For The Night is a soft and emotional music video that captures a special late-night moment, a quiet connection, and the feeling of being close to someone, even if just for a night.
This visual story is crafted with clean cinematic shots, soft lighting, and smooth transitions, creating a calm and immersive atmosphere that beautifully blends with the night-time mood of the music.

The video focuses on gentle emotions, meaningful moments, and subtle storytelling, making it suitable for all audiences and fully compliant with YouTube‚Äôs Community Guidelines and monetization policies.

snippet.title: Tu Jo Hain Toh Main Hoon - 8K/4K Music Video | Emraan Hashmi, Amyra Dastur | Ankit Tiwari | Mr. X
snippet.description:
Experience the soul-stirring romance of Tu Jo Hain now presented in stunning 8K/4K quality. Featuring Emraan Hashmi and Amyra Dastur, this heartfelt track from the movie Mr. X is beautifully sung and composed by Ankit Tiwari.

#tujohain #8k #4k #emraanhashmi #amyradastur #mrx #ankittiwari #romantichitsong #lovesongshindi 

Song Name - Tu Jo Hain 
Movie - Mr. X 
Singer - Ankit Tiwari 
Composer - Ankit Tiwari 
Lyricists - Monish Raza 
Music Label - Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd.

Lyrics of Tu Jo Hain Toh Main Hoon 
teri saanso ki saans me jo hu to main hu
tere khwabo ki aanch me jo hu to main hu
tere hone se hi mera hona hai
tujhko khona jaise khudko khona
tu jo hai to main hu yu jo hai to main hu
tu jo hai to main hu yu jo hai to main hu

bin tere mera kya hai jisko sunu jisko kahu
bin tere mujhme kya hai jisko jiyu jisme rahu
tujhme hi duniya meri hai, tere ik pal me sadiya meri
bin tere main sehra saa hu, bin tere main qatra bhi nahi
tere hone se hi mera hona hai
tujhko khona jaise khudko khona
tu jo hai to main hu yu jo hai to main hu
tu jo hai to main hu yu jo hai to main hu

tu mere chehre pe hai raahat saa jo thehra hua
main bhi tere haatho me kismat sa hu bikhra hua
tu meri ruh saa hai tujhko chhu ke main zinda lagu
jab bhi main mujhko dekhu mujhme bhi main tujh sa lagu
tere hone se hi mera hona hai
tujhko khona jaise khudko khona
tu jo hai to main hu yu jo hai to main hu
tu jo hai to main hu yu jo hai to main hu

snippet.title: Khal Nayak Hoon Main - Lyrical | Khal Nayak | Sanjay Dutt, Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod 90's
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Movie: Khal Nayak
Singers: Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal

Movie Credits:
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
StarCast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Song Lyrics:

Ji Haan 
Main Hoon Khal Nayak

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 

Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hai Tu
Is Pyaar Ki Tujhko Kya Kadar
Is Pyaar Ke Kahan Layak Hai Tu

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Teri Tabiyat Toh Rangeen Hai 
Par Tu Mohabbat Ki Tauheen Hai

Kuch Bhi Nahi Yaad Iske Siwa
Na Main Kisika Na Koi Mera
Jo Cheez Maangi Nahi Woh Mili
Karta Main Kya Aur Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li

Main Bhi Sharafat Se Jeeta Magar
Mujhko Shareefon Se Lagta Tha Darr
Sabko Pata Tha Main Kamzor Hoon
Main Isliye Aaj Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu

Kitne Khilono Se Khela Hai Tu 
Afsos Phir Bhi Akela Hai Tu

Bachpan Mein Likhi Kahani Meri
Kaise Badalti Jawani Meri
Saara Samundar Mere Paas Hai
Ek Boond Paani Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Dekha Tha Maa Ne Kabhi Pyaar Se
Ab Mil Gayi Woh Bhi Sansaar Se
Main Woh Lootera Hoon Jo Lutt Gaya 
Maa Ka Bhi Aanchal Kahin Chhut Gaya

Adhuri Si Mohabbat, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai ‚ÄĒ jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ‚Ě§ÔłŹ

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate

Lyrics:-
Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Sircode ve bande hai, jinse thari gel ladaai hoti hai
O duniya hori fan bawli, khoob badaai hoya kare

Dushman aape ban jaave, jab jaan chadhaai hoya kare
Are baaj chale, swaraj chale, re feto jinka khaaj chale

Vaidh badya badmasha ka, tu karta gel ilaaj chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

en-US.title: By listening to this complete fast story of Thursday, happiness, wealth and Vishnu Lakshmi come t...
en-US.description:
Brihaspativar Vrat Katha "Thursday Fast Story" -
Reading or listening to the Thursday fast story increases happiness, wealth, prosperity, and knowledge by the grace of Lord Vishnu and Brihaspati Dev. This fast removes obstacles to marriage, confers children, brings happiness and peace in married life, and fulfills all desires.

Rules and method of the fast:
* Wake up early in the morning, take a bath, and wear yellow clothes.
* Worship a banana tree, offering turmeric, gram dal, and yellow flowers.
* Offer yellow items (sweets, fruits) during the puja.
* Be sure to listen to or read the Thursday fast story.
* Avoid using salt in your food; eat yellow foods (such as gram dal pudding).
